title: Tracing, Evals, and Failure Analysis · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: Evaluate a multi-turn tool agent across realistic environments. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for an agent trace and evaluation suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Record decisions, tool calls, results, state changes, timing, and identifiers without exposing private reasoning.
Evaluate action trajectories and state outcomes as well as final text.
Build deterministic environments and representative multi-turn cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
